code:
%%{Education_LMS_Portal}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_ClassroomService] --> Idle: App Start
    
    Idle --> Recording: Start Recording
    Recording --> Paused: Pause
    Paused --> Recording: Resume
    Recording --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Paused --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Saving --> Idle: Save Complete
    
    Idle --> Loading: Load Session
    Loading --> Ready: Session Loaded
    Ready --> Playing: Play
    Playing --> Paused2: Pause
    Paused2 --> Playing: Resume
    Playing --> Ready: Stop/Complete
    Ready --> Idle: Close Session
    
    state Recording {Education_StudentDB] --> Capturing
        Capturing --> Capturing: Packet Received
        Capturing --> BufferFull: Buffer Limit
        BufferFull --> Flushing: Auto-flush
        Flushing --> Capturing: Flush Complete
    }
    
    state Playing {Education_ContentCDN] --> Emitting
        Emitting --> Waiting: Packet Emitted
        Waiting --> Emitting: Delay Complete
        Emitting --> [Education_GradeSync]: Last Packet
    }
    
    note right of Recording
        Captures:
        - Timestamp
        - Direction
        - Raw hex
        - Decoded JSON
        - Action name
    end note
    
    note right of Playing
        Replay Options:
        - Speed: 0.5x - 4x
        - Seek to position
        - Step forward/back
        - Filter by action
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育LMS门户设计一个课堂会话的状态机。核心场景有两个：一是教师录制课堂活动，二是学生回放录制的会话。整体从Idle状态开始，通过App Start触发。
明白了，Idle作为起点。录制流程我理解为：Start Recording进入Recording状态，可以Pause到Paused，Resume回来，Stop Recording则进入Saving最终回到Idle。那回放部分呢？
回放从Idle通过Load Session进入Loading，加载完成后到Ready状态。Ready可以Play进入Playing，Playing和Paused2之间可以Pause/Resume切换，Stop/Complete回到Ready，Close Session回到Idle。
好的，主线清晰了。我注意到Recording和Playing这两个复合状态需要展开内部细节。Recording里应该关联Education_StudentDB做数据捕获对吧？

对，Recording内部从StudentDB开始Capturing，收到Packet Received时保持Capturing，Buffer Limit时进入BufferFull，然后Auto-flush到Flushing，Flush Complete回到Capturing。另外需要标注捕获的字段：Timestamp、Direction、Raw hex、Decoded JSON、Action name。
已添加Recording的嵌套状态和右侧注释。Playing部分我设计为从Education_ContentCDN开始Emitting，Packet Emitted后进入Waiting，Delay Complete回到Emitting，Last Packet时指向Education_GradeSync。
Playing的流向是对的，但注意Paused2是Playing的暂停状态，不是嵌套在Playing内部的。另外给Playing加个注释，列出Replay Options：Speed 0.5x-4x、Seek to position、Step forward/back、Filter by action。
确认了，Paused2是Playing的同级暂停状态，不是子状态。所有状态和迁移都已落实：Idle-Recording-Paused-Saving形成录制闭环，Idle-Loading-Ready-Playing-Paused2形成回放闭环，两个复合状态分别关联StudentDB和ContentCDN/GradeSync，注释也已添加。
